basicDetails.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Industrial Parks: Infrastructure Facilities

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Industrial Parks" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy aims to boost industrial growth through financial assistance, modern technologies, and enhanced facilities for industrial parks and clusters.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The scheme &quot;Financial Assistance to Industrial Parks&quot; is an umbrella scheme launched by the Industries and Mines Department, Gujarat under the  Gujarat Industrial Policy. Effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025, it aims to boost industrial growth through financial assistance, modern technologies, and enhanced facilities for industrial parks and clusters.
The component &quot;Infrastructure Facilities&quot;, is designed to encourage the development of Industrial Parks by reimbursing a portion of eligible fixed capital investments.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Comprehensive Support:** Development of critical infrastructure like roads, power, water, and communication for industrial operations.  - **Support for Residential Facilities:** Up to 25% of the cost of constructing hostels or dormitories for domiciled workers, with a maximum limit of ₹20,00,00,000/-.
schemeContent.exclusions_md:
The following expenditures are ineligible for assistance under the scheme:

  - Expenditure on the purchase of land and land development.
  - Payments related to goodwill fees, commissioning fees, and royalty.
  - Costs associated with preliminary and pre-operative expenses.
  - Interest capitalized during the project.
  - Costs for transportation equipment or vehicles.
  - Payments for technical fees or consultant fees.
  - Any expenditure on working capital or items not explicitly mentioned as eligible investments.
  - Any other expenditure classified as ineligible by the State Level Empowered Committee (SLEC).

children.text: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Industrial Parks" is an umbrella scheme launched by the Industries and Mines Department, Gujarat under the  Gujarat Industrial Policy. Effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025, it aims to boost industrial growth through financial assistance, modern technologies, and enhanced facilities for industrial parks and clusters.
The component "Infrastructure Facilities", is designed to encourage the development of Industrial Parks by reimbursing a portion of eligible fixed capital investments.
Comprehensive Support:
Development of critical infrastructure like roads, power, water, and communication for industrial operations.
Support for Residential Facilities:
Up to 25% of the cost of constructing hostels or dormitories for domiciled workers, with a maximum limit of ₹20,00,00,000/-.
The following expenditures are ineligible for assistance under the scheme:
Expenditure on the purchase of land and land development.
Payments related to goodwill fees, commissioning fees, and royalty.
Costs associated with preliminary and pre-operative expenses.
Interest capitalized during the project.
Costs for transportation equipment or vehicles.
Payments for technical fees or consultant fees.
Any expenditure on working capital or items not explicitly mentioned as eligible investments.
Any other expenditure classified as ineligible by the State Level Empowered Committee (SLEC).
Registration Process:
Step 1:
Visit the
Investor Facilitation Portal (IFP)
portal. Click on "New Investor Registration" to access the registration form.
Step 2:
Fill in the Registration Form. Click on "Submit".
Step 3:
Verify the E-mail ID using the link sent on your registered E-mail ID.
Step 4:
After verification, you will be registered successfully.
Post-Registration Process:
Step 1:
Visit the
Investor Facilitation Portal (IFP)
portal. Click on "Login".
Step 2:
Enter the email address and password you used during registration.
Step 3:
Click the "Login" button to access your account.
Step 4:
Now fill in the required details and mandatory documents about your business to complete the application process.
Helpdesk
Contact Here

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:** **Step 1:** Visit the [Investor Facilitation Portal (IFP)](https://ifp.gujarat.gov.in/DIGIGOV/) portal. Click on "New Investor Registration" to access the registration form. **Step 2:** Fill in the Registration Form. Click on "Submit". **Step 3:** Verify the E-mail ID using the link sent on your registered E-mail ID. **Step 4:** After verification, you will be registered successfully.
> **Post-Registration Process:** **Step 1:** Visit the [Investor Facilitation Portal (IFP)](https://ifp.gujarat.gov.in/DIGIGOV/) portal. Click on "Login". **Step 2:** Enter the email address and password you used during registration. **Step 3:** Click the "Login" button to access your account. **Step 4:** Now fill in the required details and mandatory documents about your business to complete the application process.
> **Helpdesk****:** [Contact Here](https://ifp.gujarat.gov.in/DIGIGOV/IFP-pages/contact.jsp?pagedisp=static)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - Industries Association / any enterprise registered under the Societies Act, Partnership Act, Trust Act, Companies Act or SPV constituted for setting up of Industrial Park shall be eligible to develop Industrial Park under this scheme.

children.text: Industries Association / any enterprise registered under the Societies Act, Partnership Act, Trust Act, Companies Act or SPV constituted for setting up of Industrial Park shall be eligible to develop Industrial Park under this scheme.
